headline: Comcast Just Split Itself Up: These 5 Conglomerates Could Be Next

headline: Disney (DIS) Settles $50 Million Streaming Case As EU Patent Ban Widens
summary: Disney (NYSE:DIS) has agreed to a $50 million class action settlement related to its streaming price practices. The settlement addresses allegations that Disney influenced streaming market pricing in a way that affected consumers. Separately, a European patent injunction now applies across 11 EU countries to Disney’s video streaming technologies. The injunction could affect how Disney deploys and licenses its streaming infrastructure in key European markets. For investors following Disney,...
